description_long: This cowshed is a rectangular, single-story agricultural building with a prominent gable roof clad in red corrugated material. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The front features a large sliding barn door with visible black metal hinges and a partially open side, supported by wooden posts, likely for ventilation and access. The roof overhangs slightly, providing some shelter along the open side. There are no visible windows, and the ends of the building are solid wood panels. The overall design is functional, prioritizing durability and ease of access for livestock.
description: A rectangular wooden cowshed with a red gable roof, large sliding barn door, and an open side supported by posts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large sliding barn door, open side with supporting posts, and the overhanging red gable roof.
description_view_1: End view displaying the solid wooden wall and the full slope of the red gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the long, uninterrupted wooden plank wall and the expanse of the red roof.
description_view_3: Opposite end view with a solid wooden wall and the gable roof's peak visible.
attribute_door_style: sliding barn door, wooden with black metal hinges
